$comment: SAIL project launch recipes — configuration data, not code. Each entry teaches `sma sail` how to launch, fingerprint, and cap one app-under-test. {PORT} is substituted in argv/env; {PID} additionally in post_launch. See docs/SAIL_SWEETSPOT_APP_INSTANCE_LEASE.md.

example-electron-app.$comment: Template entry — copy, rename, and adapt. Not launchable as-is.
